jsonld.name: Counterfactual Interference Pattern
jsonld.description: The relational distortion between multiple unrealized conversation trajectories where each counterfactual's projected shape is modified by awareness of the others, creating ghost-conversations that exist not as independent alternatives but in mutual phenomenological relation.
